item.title: RT @dmwlff: After 2.1.117, you may notice that Claude doesn't call its Grep or Glob Tool anymore. YES!!! It only took four months. It's fa…
item.description: RT @dmwlff: After 2.1.117, you may notice that Claude doesn't call its Grep or Glob Tool anymore. YES!!! It only took four months. It's fa…

item.title:
Session store adapters in Agent SDK are now live! We published example adapters in TS and Python for S3, Redis, and Postgres adapter shapes.
You can now mirror transcripts to your own backend, so a s
item.description:
Session store adapters in Agent SDK are now live! We published example adapters in TS and Python for S3, Redis, and Postgres adapter shapes.
You can now mirror transcripts to your own backend, so a session created on one host can be resumed on another.
https://t.co/Tsig9T9hsd

item.title: RT @seconds_0: 4.7 is the best model anthropic has ever released and its not even close. its incredible
item.description: RT @seconds_0: 4.7 is the best model anthropic has ever released and its not even close. its incredible

item.title:

item.title: RT @mweinbach: 2 prompts deep into Opus 4.7 and benchmarks don’t do it justice. Way better behavior and instruction following. Pretty massi…

item.title: RT @bcherny: Opus 4.7 feels more intelligent, agentic, and precise than 4.6. It took a few days for me to learn how to work with it effecti…

item.title:
We just launched Routines. We just launched Claude Opus 4.7.
The real unlock is using them together.
4.7 was built for full-throttle agentic work, judgment under ambiguity, and self-verifying outp
item.description:
We just launched Routines. We just launched Claude Opus 4.7.
The real unlock is using them together.
4.7 was built for full-throttle agentic work, judgment under ambiguity, and self-verifying outputs. Perfect for routines that work in the background. https://t.co/QIDgEAJrRG https://t.co/EDj5kkn

item.title: RT @bcherny: We're also rolling out auto mode for Max users. This means no more permission prompts — give Claude a task, let it run, come b…
item.description: RT @bcherny: We're also rolling out auto mode for Max users. This means no more permission prompts — give Claude a task, let it run, come b…
